description_long: This surfboard features a sleek, streamlined shape with a pointed nose and a rounded tail, designed for optimal performance on water. The deck is predominantly white with angular, geometric black line patterns and a thin red outline running along the rail, giving it a modern, sporty appearance. Three fins are mounted on the underside near the tail, arranged in a thruster configuration for stability and maneuverability. The surface appears smooth and glossy, likely constructed from fiberglass or epoxy over a foam core, typical of high-quality surfboards. There are visible brand logos and markings on the deck, adding to its professional look. The overall build suggests it is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for urban storage or transport.
description: A modern white surfboard with black geometric patterns, a red rail outline, and three fins in a thruster setup. The surface is smooth and glossy, with visible brand logos and a streamlined shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the board's thin profile, red rail outline, and three fins extending from the underside near the tail.
description_view_1: Nose-on view highlighting the pointed tip, geometric deck patterns, and the board's width at the front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the board's curvature, red rail, and the fins' placement from a different angle.
description_view_3: Tail-on view showing the rounded tail, all three fins, and the deck's geometric design concentrated near the back.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible black logo is present on the upper deck near the tail, medium-sized, with stylized text and a circular emblem.
attribute_fin_configuration: Three fins in a thruster configuration, medium-sized, with a slightly curved shape, all positioned near the tail.
attribute_leash_attachment: A leash plug is visible at the tail end of the board, embedded in the deck, with a small metal or plastic ring.
attribute_deck_pad_design: No distinct deck pad is visible; the deck is covered with geometric line patterns but lacks a separate traction pad.
attribute_artwork_or_graphics: Geometric black line artwork covers the white deck, with a thin red outline along the rail; no additional imagery or decorative graphics.
